description: Rules proposed automatically by the Phase LEARN pipeline based on trending rubric-criterion failures. Every rule here was drafted by an LLM, then human-reviewed and approved before landing. Empty by design until the first proposal is approved.

guidelines.rule: Ensure card components are used to group distinct, rich content or interactive elements, not merely as containers for single text items or simple list entries.
guidelines.why: The CARDS_JUSTIFIED criterion has a 62% fail rate across 8 recent evaluations, indicating that card components are frequently used without sufficient content or justification.
examples: BAD: A card containing only 'Recipe Name'
GOOD: A card containing 'Recipe Name', 'Prep Time', 'Ingredients Summary', and a 'View Recipe' button
